meaning: 乌波卢岛[南太平洋](岛国西萨摩亚的主岛之一)
examples: You also have the opportunity to visit Oyster Reef as you sail out to beautiful Upolu Cay.
You also have the opportunity to visit Oyster Reef as you sail out to beautiful Upolu Cay. Oyster Reef is teeming with marine life and offers some of the best coral viewing on the Great Barrier Reef.
His increasingly eccentric household finally settled on the island of Upolu, in Samoa.
